title: CloudSync Dashboard
description: A real-time analytics dashboard for monitoring cloud infrastructure. Features live metrics, alerting, and team collaboration tools built for DevOps teams managing multi-cloud environments.

title: NeuralChat AI
description: An AI-powered conversational platform with multi-model support, RAG pipelines, and a custom prompt engineering interface. Handles 50K+ daily active users with sub-200ms response times.

title: Pixel Motion
description: A creative coding platform for generative art. Users write shaders and JavaScript sketches that compile to WebGL, with a gallery and social sharing features.

title: PayFlow API
description: A developer-friendly payment processing API with SDKs for 6 languages, webhook management, and PCI-DSS compliance built in. Powers transactions for 200+ merchants.

title: DevBoard
description: A Kanban-style project management tool designed for engineering teams. Features sprint planning, GitHub integration, automated standups, and velocity tracking.

title: Healthpulse
description: A health and fitness tracking mobile app with workout plans, nutrition logging, and social challenges. Built as a progressive web app with offline support.
